label: Drink a glass of water immediately upon waking up
Stand with your back straight against the wall for 1 minute
Look 20 feet away for 20 seconds
Perform 10 squats
Clean your phone screen
Wash your hands thoroughly with soap for 20 seconds
Take 5 deep abdominal breaths
Walk around the room for 2 minutes
Eat any piece of fruit
Massage your neck and shoulders for 1 minute
Think of one thing you are grateful for
Smile at yourself in the mirror
Spend 2 minutes in complete silence
Write down the single most important task to do
Read exactly one page of a book
Listen to a favorite song in its entirety
Forgive yourself for a small mistake
Tidy up a small corner of your desk
Turn off all notifications for 30 minutes
Record a dream you remember
Open the window for fresh air
Message a friend you haven't seen in a long time
Look into the morning sunlight
Water or look at a green sprout
Eat a meal without looking at a screen
Sincerely compliment someone
Leave your phone in another room while sleeping
Prepare your clothes for tomorrow tonight
Soak your feet in warm water before bed
Open the Death Clock app and check the time
